member.name: T:BadEntityIdException
member.summary: Custom exception thrown by the entity helper validate method when the account id and checksum are invalid.

member.name: F:BadEntityIdException.Shard
member.summary: the shard portion of the account id

member.name: F:BadEntityIdException.Realm
member.summary: the realm portion of the account id

member.name: F:BadEntityIdException.Num
member.summary: the num portion of the account id

member.name: M:BadEntityIdException.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String,System.String)_3
member.param: the shard portion of the account id
the realm portion of the account id
the num portion of the account id
